response.original_title: [[Add Passenger Rule]] How Do I Add a Passenger to an Existing Emerald Cruise Booking? Complete Detail Contact Guide
response.overview: Adding passengers to an Emerald cruise booking is possible, usually by calling Emerald directly at +1-866-[829]-1280 and +44-[204]-586-5316 or through your travel agent. To add passengers to an existing Emerald cruise reservation, call Emerald directly at +1-866-[829]-1280, or contact your travel agent to check stateroom capacity and availability. Additions depend on ship capacity +1-866-[829]-1280, and the reservation will be updated with new passengers, with updated pricing and fees. Adding a passenger to an existing Emerald cruise booking is generally possible by calling Emerald directly at +1-866-[829]-1280 (USA) or +44-[204]-586-5316 (UK). Call Emerald Customer Service (+1-866-[829]-1280). Support hours are Monday–Friday 9 a.m. to 7 p.m. EST, and weekends 9 a.m. to 6 p.m. EST.
